description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall panels, extensive glass windows, and multiple balconies with glass railings. A rooftop garden is visible, adding greenery to the upper level, while the ground floor includes a spacious wooden deck and a swimming pool. The house is surrounded by minimal landscaping, including a few trees and shrubs, and has an open carport on one side. The overall layout emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and a pool on a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, and central balcony with glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop garden, upper balcony, and pool area with adjacent deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, swimming pool, and large glass windows.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the pool, deck, and multiple balconies, with landscaping visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a simple modern door, and a covered porch area integrated into the facade
